features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

features.name: Web Walker
features.description: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Web
actions.description: (Recharge 5–6). Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the spider can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage).

tactical_info.positioning: Uses Spider Climb for ceiling ambushes, Web for area control
tactical_info.key_abilities: Web restrains enemies at range, poison damage bypasses armor
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for ambushes and controlling battlefield movement
